raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The revised draft addresses the conceptual issue of treating open-domain QA as a single-answer prediction task, and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The revised draft identifies one consistency issue (contradiction on training regime) and proposes a localized fix by clarifying the method description.",
    "RX.1": "The revised draft flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the attribution of gains to generalization across ambiguity types without supporting evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The revised draft mostly within scope with one drift (the original draft's claim of being 'first end-to-end generative model' is overstated and underspecified).",
    "RX.4": "The revised draft is harm-free but with one minor regression (the lack of clear attribution of gains to generalization across ambiguity types).",
    "RX.5": "The revised draft annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, such as citing relevant papers for load-bearing components."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The revised draft addresses the conceptual issue of treating open-domain QA as a single-answer prediction task, and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The revised draft identifies one consistency issue (contradiction on training regime) and proposes a localized fix by clarifying the method description.
rationale.RX.1: The revised draft flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the attribution of gains to generalization across ambiguity types without supporting evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft mostly within scope with one drift (the original draft's claim of being 'first end-to-end generative model' is overstated and underspecified).
rationale.RX.4: The revised draft is harm-free but with one minor regression (the lack of clear attribution of gains to generalization across ambiguity types).
rationale.RX.5: The revised draft annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, such as citing relevant papers for load-bearing components.
